calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2025 Off Calendar

Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a request for default judgment against defendant James Ma.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:38:35 a.m. pausing at 9:50:33 a.m., resuming at 9:53:40 a.m., pausing at 10:01:45 a.m., resuming at 00:07:32 a.m. and concluding at 10:09:33 a.m. (D505)

David Helbraun, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Tamsyn Waterhouse who was placed under oath and testified via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant James Ma not appearing.

Complaint for Damages filed on Jul-19-2022.
Proof of publication of summons filed on Sep-01-2023.
Default entered on Oct-09-2023 as to defendant.
Dismissal filed against Does on Nov-14-2024.

The Court has reviewed the moving papers and is inclined to decline the requested 7% pre-judgment interest.
Counsel to provide summary of the case and offer of proof.

The Court examines plaintiff. Plaintiff testifies.

The Court grants the requested 7% pre judgment interest with the starting date of when the complaint was filed with the court to today's date.

Good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant:

Damages $15,732.02
Prejudgment Interest at 7% $2,830.24
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $1,769.50
Total Judgment $20,331.76

Proposed judgment as amended by the Court is signed and filed this day.
